name: read_json
description: Read specific keys/fields from JSON files with optional filter and --scripts shorthand for package.json.

parameters.name: keys
parameters.description: One or more dot-separated key paths (e.g., scripts.test)

parameters.name: --filter=STRING
parameters.description: Only show entries containing STRING in key or value

parameters.name: --scripts
parameters.description: Shorthand to extract scripts object from package.json

examples.expected: test: run-s -s test-client test-packages test-server test-build-tools

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces verbose cat+grep+python3 json parsing with one short command, saving steps and command tokens.
